evals.name: cliff-config-audit
evals.prompt: Fix our cliff.toml. It's currently including 'chore' commits in the 'Features' section.
evals.expected_output: Corrected [git.commit_parsers] mapping 'chore' to a separate 'Maintenance' section.

evals.name: constitutional-attribution
evals.prompt: Write a release note for our new atomic transaction feature.
evals.expected_output: Description including 'Implement atomic transactions (V1)' or similar anchor.
